heading: Expeditious travel
label: 5733 Expeditious travel
text: The travel of an employee shall be by the most expeditious means of transportation practicable and shall be commensurate with the nature and purpose of the duties of the employee requiring such travel.
notes: Effective DateSection effective thirty days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1967 Amendment note under .Dec. 16, 1967section 220(a)(4) of Pub. L. 90–206section 5542 of this title
